Open Source Contributions

1. Linux Kernel

37 patches merged into mainline Linux across filesystems, memory management, networking, BPF, and core kernel subsystems. All patches on kernel.org.

View all kernel patches →

2. OpenTelemetry

Fixed a recursive deadlock in the OpenTelemetry Python SDK triggered under concurrent tracing load. Diagnosed root cause, wrote reproducer, merged upstream.

View OpenTelemetry contribution →
